Journal Article · Nano Today, 52, 101981

Single-Atom Nanozymes Based Nanobee Vehicle for Autophagy Inhibition-Enhanced Synergistic Cancer Therapy

Man Wang, Chunzheng Yang, Mengyu Chang, Yulin Xie, Guoqing Zhu, Yanrong Qian, Pan Zheng, Qianqian Sun, Jun Lin*, and Chunxia Li*

DOI Paper Code Slides

Abstract

A single-atom nanozyme-based nanobee vehicle for autophagy inhibition-enhanced synergistic cancer therapy.

Highlights

  • Uses single-atom nanozyme architecture in a nanobee vehicle.
  • Targets autophagy inhibition to enhance cancer therapy.

Add nanobee vehicle design and autophagy-inhibition mechanism here.

Citation

Man Wang et al. Single-Atom Nanozymes Based Nanobee Vehicle for Autophagy Inhibition-Enhanced Synergistic Cancer Therapy. Nano Today 2023, 52, 101981.
